channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live
item.description: Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham confirmed as Labour’s Makerfield by-election candidate in make-or-break battle with Reform
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham confirmed as Labour’s Makerfield by-election candidate in make-or-break battle with Reform

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Senior minister defends decision to withhold some Mandelson files
item.description: Senior minister defends decision to withhold some Mandelson files

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham could beat Farage in a general election, new poll suggests
item.description: Burnham could beat Farage in a general election, new poll suggests

item.title: BBC Politics: Welsh first minister confirms he discussed independence with Starmer
item.description: Welsh first minister confirms he discussed independence with Starmer

item.title: The Telegraph: Mandelson files will be biggest release of documents since Chilcot - The Telegraph
item.description: Mandelson files will be biggest release of documents since Chilcot - The Telegraph

item.title: i Politics: The plumber who Farage thinks will beat Burnham
item.description: The plumber who Farage thinks will beat Burnham

item.title: FT UK Politics: Reform UK unveils candidate to challenge Andy Burnham in by-election
item.description: Reform UK unveils candidate to challenge Andy Burnham in by-election

item.title: The Guardian: Andy Burnham confirmed as Labour candidate for Makerfield byelection - The Guardian
item.description: Andy Burnham confirmed as Labour candidate for Makerfield byelection - The Guardian
